2008June 8, 2008

🇿🇦 Sun City, South Africa

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Sun City, South Africa, June 8, 2008 -- June 13, 2008

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2008-06-sun-city-south-africa

11 Resolutions

753Plenary
Subdivide ISO 15926-7 into parts 7 through 10
SC4 resolves that the current content may be published as the following ISO 15926 parts: * Part 7: Templates and methodology * Part 8: OWL representation * Part 9: Interfaces through facades * Part...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
752Plenary
Align OMG activity on data quality with WG 13
SC4 invites the Object Management Group (OMG) to take account of the scope and deliverables of the approved ISO 8000 work programme on data quality (ISO/TC 184/SC 4 N2271) in moving forward with ac...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
751Plenary
Propose new scope for ISO/TC 184/SC 4
SC4 requests its secretariat by 2008-06-30 to provide ISO/TC 184 with the following proposed new scope for SC4: Standardization of the definition, integration and quality management of information ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
750Plenary
Terminate liaisons to IEC SB3 and ISO/TC 10/SC 6
SC4 requests its secretariat to terminate the liaison to IEC SB3 and ISO/TC 10/SC 6.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
749Plenary
Express concerns regarding ISO/TC 37/SC 3 NWI 22274
SC4 expresses the following concerns regarding NWI 22274 from ISO/TC 37/SC 3: * This proposal appears to violate the agreements made at the ISO/TC 37 Beijing 2006 and Provo 2007 meetings. * SC4's r...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
748Plenary
Appoint Phil Spiby as INCOSE liaison officer
SC4 appoints Dr. Phil Spiby as the liaison officer to the INCOSE.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
747Plenary
Appoint WG 13 Deputy Conveners
SC4 approves the appointment of Ms. Emily Grantner and Mr. Leif Gyllström as Deputy Conveners for WG 13 for a period of three years.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 offers thanks to those external projects who presented their material at the Open Technical Forum: * "Combining Gellish and RDF" (Leo van Ruijven) * "RDF Pilot for Materials" (David Leal)
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 expresses its appreciation to our SC4 Liaisons and those projects who presented at the Liaison Plenary: * IAI (Thomas Liebich) * ISO/TC 207 and VAMAS (Anna Moreno) * SASIG (Oscar Rocha) * ISO/T...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 notes with regret the resignation of Len Slovensky from the positions of WG 3 Deputy Convenor and AP229 project leader and editor, and wishes him well in his future endeavours.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 expresses its appreciation to SABS, PiLog, SASOL, Transnet and Traces of Africa for their hosting and support of the 55th ISO/TC 184/SC 4 Plenary Meeting at the Sun City Hotel, Sun City, South ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
